claim: Rapid up-regulation and higher basal expression of interferon-induced genes reduce survival of granule cell neurons that are infected by West Nile virus.

result.claim: Rapid up-regulation and higher basal expression of interferon-induced genes reduce survival of granule cell neurons that are infected by West Nile virus.
result.reasoning: While the knowledge base contains information about West Nile virus (Paper ID: 12885341), interferon-stimulated genes (Paper ID: 9433958), and granule cell neurons (Paper ID: 9433958), no direct evidence was found to support or refute the specific claim that "Rapid up-regulation and higher basal expression of interferon-induced genes reduce survival of granule cell neurons that are infected by West Nile virus." Searches for similar propositions and chunks, as well as targeted searches within the most relevant paper (9433958), did not yield any propositions explicitly linking these elements in the manner described by the claim. Therefore, there is insufficient evidence in the provided knowledge base to verify this claim.
